description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push, pull request, and on a scheduled basis (every Monday at 7AM UTC). Use a matrix strategy with multiple ubuntu-18.04 jobs for different Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9), with variations in using conda, distribution installs, and code coverage. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install test dependencies (using conda or pip), run tests with pytest, and check for leftover files.
